hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'use-app-store/\(types\|createState\|migrate\)'; then echo '[Zustand Persist] types/createState/migrate が変更されました。persist-migration-check の実行を推奨します。'; fi

for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ':' ' ' | xargs -n1 | grep '\.tsx\?$' | grep -v '__tests__' | head -1); do d=$(dirname "$f")/__tests__; b=$(basename "$f" | sed 's/\.tsx\?$//'); t=$(ls "$d"/${b}*.test.ts 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$t" ]; then echo "[Auto Test] $t"; npx vitest run "$t" 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; done
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'src/pages/.*\.tsx\|src/components/.*\.tsx'; then echo '[Visual QA] UI コンポーネントが変更されました。user-visible な変更がある場合は /visual-qa を実行してください。'; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code is waiting for your input" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs permission" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"'

echo '--- Git Status ---' && git status --short && echo '' && echo '--- Unpushed Commits ---' && (git log --oneline @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'No upstream set') && echo '' && echo '--- Pending Tasks ---' && (grep '^- \[ \]' .agents/tasks/TASKS.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No pending tasks') && DONE_COUNT=$(grep -c '^- \[x\]' .agents/tasks/TASKS.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0) && if [ "$DONE_COUNT" -gt 10 ]; then echo '' && echo "⚠ TASKS.md に完了タスク${DONE_COUNT}件 - /cleanup 推奨"; fi
